message:
feat(command): add self-recursion support for local Lua functions

Make lua_eval module public for integration testing. Add self_name field
to LuaFunc so that local function declarations (local function f(x)...)
inject the function into its own call scope, enabling self-recursion
without requiring a global assignment.

- LuaFunc gains self_name: Option<String> field
- Local function statements populate self_name from the declaration name
- call_function injects the function into the new scope when self_name
  is present, before parameter binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
